name: Firing Turret
description: This upgrade can only be attached once per game.

granted_abilities.name: Shattered Asset
granted_abilities.text: When this model is dealt 2 or more damage, this model must discard an upgrade with this ability. Then, reduce damage dealt by 2 (to a minimum of 0).

granted_abilities.name: Tactical Firing
granted_abilities.text: This model may declare (gun) actions while engaged.

extraction_notes: The 'This model gains the following abilities:' text is treated as descriptive text within the card's main description context.
Limitations section shows a single dash '-' indicating no specific limitations beyond the one-per-game rule stated in description.
